heroSub: Frontend Developer specializing in React.js & Next.js — building fast, accessible, and pixel-perfect web experiences.
p1desc: Full-featured e-commerce app with cart, wishlist, online/cash payment, orders, categories, brands, and strong state management.

e1desc: Working as a Frontend Developer building web solutions using React.js and Next.js in an Agile environment.
e2desc: Worked on international projects for clients in the US and Saudi Arabia. Left due to company layoffs.

e5desc: Bachelor's degree with GPA 3.04/4.00. Strong foundation in computer science and software engineering.
